testcase.name: test_regular_user_cannot_create_event
testcase.failure: tests/test_phase4_calendar.py:445: in test_regular_user_cannot_create_event assert response.status_code == 403, f"Expected 403, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 403, got 200: {"id":"21374f45-4b90-4ba6-884c-5adb449c086e","team_id":"4a3f0d71-7b53-4b1f-b791-00231c206bd3","event_type":"treino","title":"TEST_Unauthorized Event","description":null,"location":"Pavilhão","start_time":"2026-04-02T18:00:00","end_time":null,"opponent":null,"championship_id":null,"status":"scheduled","created_by":"da6d1f84-01ab-4741-a588-af5bfd02d8f6","created_at":"2026-03-25T13:35:16.536921+00:00"} E assert 200 == 403 E + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_regular_user_cannot_delete_event
testcase.failure: tests/test_phase4_calendar.py:478: in test_regular_user_cannot_delete_event assert delete_response.status_code == 403, f"Expected 403, got {delete_response.status_code}: {delete_response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 403, got 200: {"message":"Evento eliminado"} E assert 200 == 403 E + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code
